description: A composite graphic. The upper portion is a screenshot of a New York Times article with the italic headline Gotti Grandson Is Sentenced to 15 Months for Covid Relief Fraud and a two-line subhead, above a photograph of a man in a checked blazer and white shirt walking outdoors while reporters and photographers follow. A torn-paper edge transitions to a black lower band carrying a large faint ICE wordmark and a Homeland Security Investigations special agent badge with the letters HSI.
notable_text: The New York Times; Gotti Grandson Is Sentenced to 15 Months for Covid Relief Fraud; ICE; HSI
